name: reverser-wasm
description: Simple codebase for reversing a string via WebAssembly with jco

scripts.build: jco componentize reverser.mjs --wit wit/component.wit --world-name reverser --out reverser.wasm --disable all
scripts.transpile: jco transpile reverser.wasm -o dist/transpiled && mv dist/transpiled/reverser.js dist/transpiled/reverser.mjs
